BETA INCORPORATED

PROXY STATEMENT FOR 2024 ANNUAL MEETING

Date of Annual Meeting: June 18, 2024

MATTERS TO BE VOTED UPON

  • Item 1: Elect 11 directors
  • Item 2: Advisory vote on executive compensation (say-on-pay)
  • Item 3: Approve 2024 Equity Incentive Plan
  • Item 4: Ratify PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor

VOTE RESULTS

Proposal 1: For 410,000,000 Against 15,200,000 Abstain 4,100,000 Broker Non-Votes 32,000,000

Proposal 2: For 385,000,000 Against 38,500,000 Abstain 5,800,000 Broker Non-Votes 32,000,000

Proposal 3: For 328,000,000 Against 92,000,000 Abstain 5,200,000 Broker Non-Votes 32,000,000

Proposal 4: For 445,000,000 Against 8,800,000 Abstain 11,400,000

SUMMARY COMPENSATION TABLE

The following table discloses compensation for our named executive officers for fiscal years 2024 and 2023.

Name / Principal PositionFiscal YearBase SalaryAnnual BonusStock AwardsOption AwardsNon-Equity IncentiveAll Other CompTotal
